## Editorial Note - 2026-05-28

This artifact is an immutable T0 baseline captured before the Phase 4 timeframe contract was corrected to `M15/H1/H4/D1`. It remains valid baseline evidence for 2026-05-27, but it is not sufficient closeout evidence for the corrected gate.

See `.github/migration/phase-updates/phase4-timeframe-contract-correction-2026-05-28.md` for the active contract and acceptance thresholds.

---

That `levels_written=96` observation reflects the pre-correction contract and must be superseded by a fresh `levels_written=128` capture after the corrected H4 build is deployed.

## Governance Note

This file is committed in-repo so Migration Manager/review automation can ingest the baseline evidence directly. Any future regenerated export must be committed under the same migration evidence tree and linked from the status board and risk register before clearing Phase 4 gate blockers.
